title: daucus communis subsp. gummifer
intro: Daucus communis subsp. gummifer is a plant species that belongs to the carrot family and is commonly known as gum arabic or the gummy carrot. It is a perennial herb that has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a natural emollient, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Daucus communis subsp. gummifer include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and protect against infection. The plant can be prepared as a tea, powder, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine and as a natural ingredient in food products and cosmetics.
